plugins.name: callbell-dev
plugins.description: Code pack: the laziest solution that actually works, in three levels (lite, full, ultra), plus a review skill. Requires the callbell core.

plugins.name: callbell-sysadmin
plugins.description: Sysadmin pack: a passive safety layer plus on-demand server-ops skills, active where a host identity is declared. Requires the callbell core.
